caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses stands against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, patterned tunic with a small V-neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the lower-left corner of each scene, a small gold and red logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". Across the sequence, the woman is speaking, her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting slightly as she delivers her message. Her posture remains still and centered, with her gaze directed forward. The lighting is consistent throughout, highlighting her face and the pale green of her clothing against the dark void of the backdrop.
